disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: American Hantavirus Patient Ordered to Stay in Quarantine Despite Plans to Leave - The New York Times
updates.body_en: American Hantavirus Patient Ordered to Stay in Quarantine Despite Plans to Leave The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: 美国汉坦病毒患者被令隔离，尽管计划离开。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship docks in the Netherlands for disinfection - CBC
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship docks in the Netherlands for disinfection CBC
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮在荷兰靠港消毒。

updates.title_en: Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks sign of our 'dangerous' times: WHO | Hindustan Times - Hindustan Times
updates.body_en: Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks sign of our 'dangerous' times: WHO | Hindustan Times Hindustan Times
updates.summary_zh: WHO称埃博拉和汉坦病毒爆发是危险时代的标志。

updates.title_en: Britain gets experimental drug from Japan to bolster hantavirus response - Reuters
updates.body_en: Britain gets experimental drug from Japan to bolster hantavirus response Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 英国从日本获取实验性药物以加强汉坦病毒应对。

updates.title_en: WHO chief ties funding cuts to Ebola, hantavirus outbreaks - Al Jazeera
updates.body_en: WHO chief ties funding cuts to Ebola, hantavirus outbreaks Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: WHO负责人将资金削减与埃博拉和汉坦病毒爆发联系起来。

updates.title_en: Cruise ship hit by deadly hantavirus outbreak docks in Netherlands for disinfection - KOMO
updates.body_en: Cruise ship hit by deadly hantavirus outbreak docks in Netherlands for disinfection KOMO Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship now in port in Netherlands CBS News Hantavirus-hit cruise ship docks in the Netherlands after long, deadly voyage NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 致命汉坦病毒疫情邮轮在荷兰靠港消毒。

updates.title_en: Adult dies from hantavirus in Colorado - Investing.com India
updates.body_en: Adult dies from hantavirus in Colorado Investing.com India
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州一名成年人死于汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Death in Colorado Unrelated to Cruise Ship Outbreak, Officials Confirm - Newsweek
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Death in Colorado Unrelated to Cruise Ship Outbreak, Officials Confirm Newsweek
updates.summary_zh: 官方确认科罗拉多汉坦病毒死亡与邮轮疫情无关。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship docks in the Netherlands after long, deadly voyage - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship docks in the Netherlands after long, deadly voyage NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响的邮轮在荷兰靠岸，航程致命。

updates.title_en: Health leaders offer safety tips after Colorado hantavirus death - KKTV
updates.body_en: Health leaders offer safety tips after Colorado hantavirus death KKTV
updates.summary_zh: 卫生官员在科罗拉多汉坦病毒死亡后提供安全提示。

updates.title_en: How scientists developed a hantavirus PCR test in a weekend - Scientific American
updates.body_en: How scientists developed a hantavirus PCR test in a weekend Scientific American
updates.summary_zh: 科学家周末内开发出汉坦病毒PCR检测方法。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit ship docks in the Netherlands, what we know so far - Sky News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit ship docks in the Netherlands, what we know so far Sky News
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情船只停靠荷兰，Sky News 报道已知情况。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 发布汉坦病毒焦点报告，介绍已知情况与影响。

updates.title_en: Canada confirms first hantavirus case - DT Next
updates.body_en: Canada confirms first hantavirus case DT Next
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大报告首例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Adult dies of hantavirus in Colorado, state health officials say - Reuters
updates.body_en: Adult dies of hantavirus in Colorado, state health officials say Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州一名成人因汉坦病毒死亡，州卫生官员通报。

updates.title_en: Colorado adult dies from hantavirus after local rodent exposure - USA Today
updates.body_en: Colorado adult dies from hantavirus after local rodent exposure USA Today
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州一名成人因接触当地啮齿动物感染汉坦病毒死亡。

updates.title_en: WHO to give update on hantavirus and Ebola after outbreaks - BBC
updates.body_en: WHO to give update on hantavirus and Ebola after outbreaks BBC
updates.summary_zh: WHO 将就汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情发布最新通报。
